_comment: Hand-curated index of deployed sites. Edit by hand; no auto-regeneration. Order here = display order. New site goes live? Add an object. Site retired? Delete its object.

user.name: Brandon Fryslie
user.bio:
Software as a Service as a Service
At Your Service

sites.name: brandon-fryslie
sites.description: The elaborated GitHub profile — the unconstrained counterpart to github.com/brandon-fryslie. Same daily content engine; HTML/JS expression instead of sandboxed-SVG-and-markdown.

sites.name: gh-pages-showcase
sites.description: Drop-in static site template for any Pages-deployed repo. Copy four files, fill in a JSON, push — get a polished project page with zero build step. The page you're seeing is itself an instance of it.

sites.name: shader-playground
sites.description: WebGPU shader experimentation environment. Hand-tracking foundation, Poisson-multigrid gravity scheme, two-hand pinch-to-scale gestures, XR panel.

sites.name: cc-dump
sites.description: Transparent HTTP proxy for Claude Code API traffic. Real-time Textual TUI with system-prompt diff tracking, color-coded prompt tags, cache-zone analysis, HAR recording and replay.

sites.name: cc-nerf-buster
sites.description: Directly measuring the size of Claude Code's quota — what 100% actually is, in tokens, with bracketed precision. Local Go proxy plus capacity probe.

sites.name: tinkerpad
sites.description: Interactive playgrounds and Next.js tinkering. Multi-deploy parent — versioned experiments live at sub-paths under this URL.

sites.name: rich-js-ink
sites.description: Ink components for rich-js — rich terminal renderables as React components, deployed as live demos.

sites.name: oscilla-animator-v2
sites.description: Animation compiler with custom type system. Block-graph architecture, typed connections, 4-stage pipeline: parse → validate → optimize → emit.

sites.name: rich-js
sites.description: Rich terminal renderable framework — the underlying primitives that rich-js-ink wraps as React components.

sites.name: oscilla-animator
sites.description: Original animation compiler — kept live as a reference; superseded by oscilla-animator-v2's typed block-graph rewrite.
